name: ExtensionConditionDefinition_Definition
title: R5: Formal Definition for the condition (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConditionDefinition.definition` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConditionDefinition.definition` 0..* `uri`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ConditionDefinition.definition` 0..* `uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConditionDefinition.definition` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ConditionDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ConditionDefinition.definition` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Formal Definition for the condition (new)
element.comment:
Element `ConditionDefinition.definition` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ConditionDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ConditionDefinition.definition` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Formal definitions of the condition. These may be references to ontologies, published clinical protocols or research papers.
